title: german text
wikitext:
[]: regarding the subliminal             Quote Post by lance_ziacha » Sun Jul 19, 2009 2:09 pm i'd like to know if anybody's scripted out the images and words displayed during Asuka's mindrape. my dvd player doesn't quite have the capability. if anybody has i'd like to know just what it says.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 19, 2009 4:03 pm What's odd is while the Kyoko and Asuka getting mindrape bit is translated in Platinum from the German/Japanese as the Hallelujah chorus is playing: Literal Translation Project wrote: Nein (No) Ouch Erhangte (strangled) Nein (No) Don't touch me! Groll (hatred) Nein (No) Stop! Menarche (menarche) Nein (No) Keep out! Schmach (shame) Nein (No) No! Doppelselbstmud begehsh (commit double suicide) Nein (No) Ouch! ansauder(?) Nein (No) Mama Wie angerlich (How comfortable)

[]:             Quote Post by Nathan » Mon Jul 20, 2009 12:52 pm I can't believe people were actually arguing about how many eyes EVA-02 has. Thanks for that translated list Sailor Star Dust, I had been meaning to find out what all the individual frames said.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 20, 2009 1:15 pm ...That's yet another reason why I don't see why the German lines weren't translated, people ARE going to want to know what's being said, not just for thematic purposes. Not everybody speaks German but ADV at least bothered translating Asuka's ep8 lines (IIRC), though they didn't bother with her conversation in episode 22. Also: No problem.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Nov 18, 2010 5:04 pm So THATS what the fast flashing words said! Thank you so much! I' only managed to catch a few glipses so far. However, I'd like to correct some of the translation mistakes with the german: Erhangte (strangled) - Anctually more like "hanged [her]self" which is more acurate anyway. The dots over the "a" are missing and I don't think it's gramatically accurate - then again, very little of the German in NGE was. Then again, these thougfhts were flashing quickly through Asukas Head one after another, the words might be mangled on purpose here. Groll (hatred) - It basically works, but I'd say "Grudge" is more accurate... not that there's much difference in the meaning. Hatred is "Hass" which is also seen later in the Mindrape if I remember correctly. Doppelselbstmud begehsh (commit double suicide) - Ouch! It's !"Doppelselbstmord begehen". But it's quite jarring that this word is there, how mangled it may be. You know, it implied that Kyoko ACTUALLY hanged the Doll(=Asuka or at least what she thought to be Asuka) along with her ansauder(?) - Is this actually written there? Could be "Ausdauer" as in endurance or "ansehen" = to look at sth. Wie angerlich (How comfortable) - Once again, absolutely mangled. But still, it looks significantly more like "ärgerlich" (= irritating) than "angenehm" (="comfortable" Peinlich es (painful) "Peinlich" is actually "embarassing". Like the "childish" parts of herself that Arael is uncovering.

Article: german text
 few glipses so far. However, I'd like to correct some of the translation mistakes with the german: Erhangte (strangled) - Anctually more like "hanged [her]self" which is more acurate anyway. The dots over the "a" are missing and I don't think it's gramatically accurate - then again, very little of the German in NGE was. Then again, these thougfhts were flashing quickly through Asukas Head one after another, the words might be mangled on purpose here. Groll (hatred) - It basically works, but I'd say "Grudge" is more accurate... not that there's much difference in the meaning. Hatred is "Hass" which is also seen later in the Mindrape if I remember correctly. Doppelselbstmud begehsh (commit double suicide) - Ouch! It's !"Doppelselbstmord begehen". But it's quite jarring that this word is there, how mangled it may be. You know, it implied that Kyoko ACTUALLY hanged the Doll(=Asuka or at least what she thought to be Asuka) along with her ansauder(?) - Is this actually written there? Could be "Ausdauer" as in endurance or "ansehen" = to look at sth. Wie angerlich (How comfortable) - Once again, absolutely mangled. But still, it looks significantly more like "ärgerlich" (= irritating) than "angenehm" (="comfortable" Peinlich es (painful) "Peinlich" is actually "embarassing". Like the "childish" parts of herself that Arael is uncovering.
